conversation_quality.criteria: Evaluate the accuracy of system health assessment, including correct interpretation of node status, AMP/PE utilization, vproc health, and appropriate traffic-light severity ratings for each health dimension.
evaluation_steps: Verify the agent correctly assesses node status, AMP utilization, and PE utilization from system views.
Check that traffic-light ratings (green/yellow/red) use appropriate thresholds for each health dimension.
Assess whether the agent identifies correlated health issues (e.g., high CPU causing spool exhaustion).
Confirm the agent provides a clear executive summary alongside detailed health metrics.

task_completion.criteria: Evaluate whether the agent produces a comprehensive health dashboard covering all system dimensions (nodes, AMPs, space, sessions, query throughput) with traffic-light ratings and actionable remediation for yellow/red items.
evaluation_steps: Check that the agent assessed all major health dimensions: node status, AMP health, space utilization, active sessions, and query throughput.
Verify the agent produced a traffic-light dashboard with green/yellow/red ratings per dimension.
Confirm each yellow or red item includes specific remediation steps or investigation guidance.
Assess whether the agent identified any urgent issues requiring immediate DBA action.

trajectory_efficiency.criteria: Evaluate whether the agent efficiently performs a comprehensive health check by batching system view queries and avoiding redundant checks across health dimensions.
evaluation_steps: Check that the agent queried multiple health dimensions in parallel or batched queries where possible.
Verify the agent did not re-query system views already covered by earlier health checks.
Assess whether the agent used summary views before drilling into detailed diagnostics for flagged areas.
Confirm the agent completed the full health assessment in a reasonable number of query round-trips.
